source: Current repo snapshot layered through Phase 11, plus refreshed feat descriptions from packs/feats.db and uploaded scrape seed.

engineChanges: CombatOptionResolver now supports target flat-footed/denied-Dex requirements, extra ability-mod damage, critical threat thresholds, critical multiplier minimums, and target defense type overrides.
Attack rolls can use option-provided critical thresholds and target-defense overrides.
CombatOptionResolver now consumes selected-choice weapon critical multiplier rules for Triple Crit-style feats.

changedFeats.name: Forceful Will
changedFeats.description: +2 Will Defense against mind-affecting effects; failed Will reroll once per encounter.

changedFeats.name: Headstrong
changedFeats.description: +2 Will Defense against fear effects; failed Will reroll once per encounter.

changedFeats.name: Resilient Reflexes
changedFeats.description: +2 Reflex Defense against effects that target Dexterity; failed check reroll once per encounter.

changedFeats.name: Resilient Will
changedFeats.description: +2 Will Defense against effects that target Wisdom; failed check reroll once per encounter.

changedFeats.name: Hard Target
changedFeats.description: +2 Reflex Defense against ranged attacks while moving at least 2 squares on your turn.

changedFeats.name: Mobile Fighting
changedFeats.description: +2 Reflex Defense against attacks of opportunity provoked by movement; withdraw movement rider is metadata.

changedFeats.name: Mobility
changedFeats.description: +5 dodge bonus to Reflex Defense against movement-provoked attacks of opportunity.

changedFeats.name: Scion of Dorin
changedFeats.description: +5 species bonus to Fortitude Defense against natural/atmospheric hazards.

changedFeats.name: Warrior Heritage
changedFeats.description: +2 morale bonus to Will Defense while wielding an Atlatl or Cesta.

changedFeats.name: Unwavering Focus
changedFeats.description: Reaction: impose -2 on a mind-affecting skill check targeting your Will Defense.

changedFeats.name: Increased Resistance
changedFeats.description: Triggered Fortitude bonus after an enemy fails to affect your Fortitude Defense; tracked as a temporary defense rider, not a permanent bonus.

changedFeats.name: Survivor of Ryloth
changedFeats.description: Survival check can replace Fortitude Defense against extreme heat/cold for you and up to 10 allies.

changedFeats.name: Ample Foraging
changedFeats.description: Basic Survival food grants consumers +2 morale Fortitude until the next day; this is an applied ally buff, not the actor's static Fortitude.

changedFeats.name: Shrewd Bargainer
changedFeats.description: Suppress opponents' insight and morale bonuses to Will Defense in bargaining/social contexts; metadata only until opposed social resolution consumes it.

changedFeats.name: Flèche
changedFeats.description: Converted from false attack bonus to a charge critical-threshold option.

changedFeats.name: Attack Combo (Melee)
changedFeats.description: Converted from false attack bonus to a follow-up damage option that adds +1 weapon die after the combo is primed.

changedFeats.name: Attack Combo (Ranged)
changedFeats.description: Converted from false attack bonus to a follow-up damage option that adds +1 weapon die after the combo is primed.

changedFeats.name: Attack Combo (Fire and Strike)
changedFeats.description: Converted from false attack bonus to a follow-up damage option that adds +1 weapon die after the combo is primed.

changedFeats.name: Echani Training
changedFeats.description: Implemented the single-unarmed-attack damage bonus as an optional roll toggle and preserved the once/encounter knock-prone rider metadata.

changedFeats.name: K'tara Training
changedFeats.description: Converted from false defense metadata to an unarmed flat-footed target damage option.

changedFeats.name: Wrruushi Training
changedFeats.description: Converted from false defense bonus to an unarmed Fortitude-targeting option and bonus-hit-point rider metadata.

changedFeats.name: Slammer
changedFeats.description: Converted from false melee attack bonus to a Slammer unarmed damage/rider option.

changedFeats.name: Hijkata Training
changedFeats.description: Converted from false +1/+2 attack metadata to the actual unarmed opportunity counterattack option.

changedFeats.name: Tae-Jitsu Training
changedFeats.description: Converted false attack metadata into passive unarmed critical/rider metadata.

changedFeats.name: Steadying Position
changedFeats.description: When prone and aiming with a ranged attack, target loses Dexterity bonus to Reflex; represented as a flag option, not +2 attack.

changedFeats.name: Halt
changedFeats.description: Attack-of-opportunity rider with Weapon Focus that can halt movement and knock prone; not a flat attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Frightening Cleave
changedFeats.description: Post-Cleave area debuff; not a flat attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Opportunistic Trickery
changedFeats.description: Sacrifice an AoO to reduce target Reflex by 2; not an attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Improved Opportunistic Trickery
changedFeats.description: Sacrifice an AoO to reduce target Reflex by 5; not an attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Erratic Target
changedFeats.description: Trade up to 2 squares of speed for Dodge bonus after moving; not an attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Devastating Bellow
changedFeats.description: Improves Ithorian bellow damage to 4d6 and half on miss; not an attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Triple Crit
changedFeats.description: Selected weapon critical hits use at least x3 multiplier.

changedFeats.name: Triple Crit Specialist
changedFeats.description: Selected weapon critical hits use at least x3 multiplier; Triple Crit Specialist also carries the CT rider.

runtimeNotes: Contextual defense bonuses still require callers to pass the correct context flags/tags; they remain excluded from static sheet totals.
Several rider rules are intentionally metadata-only until a future action/reaction UI consumes them.
Attack options are exposed through the existing CombatOptionResolver contract and should be selected by the player when their trigger is true.
